4 Quality Information Document for 
OMI_HEALTH_TEMPSALOXY_BALTIC_mbi_bottom_salinity_arkona_bornholm 
© EU Copernicus Marine Service – Public   
CMEMS-BAL-OMI-QUID-HEALTH-

bornholm 
Issue 4.0 – November 2025 
1) INTRODUCTION 
a) Product Name  
OMI_HEALTH_TEMPSALOXY_BALTIC_mbi_bottom_salinity_arkona_bornholm. 
b) Indicator Evaluation Method 
This document provides to Copernicus Marine Service users information on the quality 
of the bottom salinity in the Arkona and Bornholm Basins of the Baltic Sea. These sites 
were chosen to represent the inflow events of the Baltic Sea and therefore grouped as 
a separate CMEMS product which is named 
BALTIC_OMI_WMHE_mbi_bottom_salinity_arkona_bornholm.  
The bottom salinity data in the Arkona and Bornholm Basins are daily values extracted 
from the BALTICSEA_MULTIYEAR_PHY_003_011 product  processed with 7 -day moving 
average filter. 
c) Copernicus Marine products used as input for the computation 
Product name (and Type) Documentation 
BALTICSEA_MULTIYEAR_PHY_003
_011 (model reanalysis) 
QUID: 
https://catalogue.marine.copernicus.eu/documents/
QUID/CMEMS-BAL-QUID-003-011.pdf 
PUM: 
https://catalogue.marine.copernicus.eu/documents/P
UM/CMEMS-BAL-PUM-003-011_012.pdf 
  
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
5 Quality Information Document for 
OMI_HEALTH_TEMPSALOXY_BALTIC_mbi_bottom_salinity_arkona_bornholm 
© EU Copernicus Marine Service – Public   
CMEMS-BAL-OMI-QUID-HEALTH-
TEMPSALOXY-mbi-bottom-salinity-arkona-
bornholm 
Issue 4.0 – November 2025 
2) SCIENTIFIC VALIDATION  
a) Major Baltic Inflow: bottom salinity  
The accuracy of the index is directly dependent on the accuracy of the Baltic reanalysis 
product (BALTICSEA_MULTIYEAR_PHY_003_011).  
The model bottom salinity product is validated against long term time series 
measurements. At the Arkona Basin, the mean bi as of the bottom salinity and cRMSD 
are -0.01 and 1.95 PSU, respectively. At the monitoring station BMPK2 which is the closest 
to the Bornholm Basin, the bottom salinity bias and cRMSD are -0.01 and 0. 45 PSU, 
respectively. Direct comparison with in-sit

catalog_entry.summary: This Quality Information Document evaluates the bottom salinity data for the Arkona and Bornholm Basins of the Baltic Sea, providing details on its accuracy and validation against long-term measurements.

variables.long_name: Bottom salinity in the Arkona and Bornholm Basins of the Baltic Sea
